text:

Author: jbeich

Log:
  science/psychopy: update to 1.82.01 and overhaul

  - Add .desktop file
  - Add shortcut under PATH
  - Define LICENSE
  - Mark NO_ARCH because of no C modules
  - Drop unused BUILD_DEPENDS
  - Convert to USE_WX
  - Replace bundled DejaVu font with slightly newer system copy
